heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 4750 Authorization of appropriations
notes: References in Text, referred to in subsec. (b), was repealed by , , .Section 665 of title 2Pub. L. 105–33, title X, § 10118(a)111 Stat. 695Aug. 5, 1997
amendments: References in Text, referred to in subsec. (b), was repealed by , , .Section 665 of title 2Pub. L. 105–33, title X, § 10118(a)111 Stat. 695Aug. 5, 1997

children.heading: Amount
children.label: a Amount
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Fund $50,000,000 to carry out this subchapter.

children.heading: Budgetary treatment
children.label: b Budgetary treatment
children.text: The amount authorized to be appropriated under subsection (a) shall be subject to discretionary spending caps, as provided in section 665 of title 2, and therefore shall reduce by an equal amount funds made available for other discretionary spending programs.1See References in Text note below.1
